2342610.name: CarLife Simulator
2342610.description:
CarLife Simulator is a realistic car driving simulator with fun and challenges for the driver. Ideal for learning how to drive a car in different conditions, off-road, cities, racing tracks for every taste, all this is available in CarLife Simulator.

Cars. Over 40 vehicles, each unique, from family sedans to rare hypercars.

Game world. An open world with a big city, interesting places full of secrets, beautiful views from the top of a mountain, or a crystal clear lake far from civilization. Racing tracks that challenge you to complete the lap as quickly as possible.

Realistic and smart AI. It is present in the game world in the form of traffic, but also in the form of rivals on the track.

Quests. From racing with merciless rivals who strive to cut and leave you behind, to passing the track for a certain time on a wet track where you have to prove your skills in combat with your car.

Photorealistic graphics. Draws you into the game more, which makes the atmosphere even more interesting and immerses you in dozens of hours of exploring the game world.

Gamepad and steering wheel support. By connecting your device, you can feel like a real driver. You can drive both automatic transmission and manual.

Attention to detail. All maps are made in detail, as well as cars. Each model is unique, each map has different interesting places and easter eggs. Cars are as close to reality as possible.

Photo mode. Realistic photo mode that allows you to take beautiful photos inside the game.

Regular updates. Every month updates are released where new cars, maps, quests, and many different goodies are added.
2342610.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
